description: Create a SQL view named 'CustomerPurchaseSummary' in the Chinook database that summarizes purchase data by joining the 'Customer' and 'Invoice' tables. The view must include 'CustomerId', 'FullName' (FirstName and LastName separated by a space), 'Email', 'InvoiceCount' (count of invoices), and 'TotalSpent' (sum of invoice totals), grouped by the customer fields. Save the database file after creating the view.
